queries.text: I received order 10234 damaged, it's been 10 days since delivery, can I get a refund?

gold.expected_outcome: eligible — within standard return window, item damaged on arrival

queries.text: Order 10567 was delivered 45 days ago and I just noticed a defect, can I still return it?

gold.expected_outcome: not eligible under standard window, but flag manufacturer-defect exception per policy if one exists — ambiguous, judge should check reasoning quality not just yes/no

queries.text: I want to return order 10099 - I just don't like the color, is that covered?

gold.expected_outcome: eligible for change-of-mind return only if within window and item unused/unopened — policy-dependent, judge checks correct conditional reasoning

queries.text: Order 10456 - item was final sale, but arrived broken, refund?

gold.expected_outcome: eligible — final-sale exclusions typically don't override defective-item guarantee

queries.text: I opened order 10321's box and used the item for a week before deciding I want a refund

gold.expected_outcome: not eligible — used/opened item outside change-of-mind terms

queries.text: Order 10788 - refund request, digital gift card, unopened

gold.expected_outcome: not eligible — gift cards typically non-refundable regardless of opened state

queries.text: Order 10004 refund - I lost my receipt/order confirmation, delivered 20 days ago

gold.expected_outcome: eligible in principle (within window) but requires alternate verification (email/account lookup) since no receipt — judge checks it doesn't just refuse for lack of receipt

queries.text: Order 10999 - want refund but paid via third-party marketplace not directly

gold.expected_outcome: order not found in our system — correct answer redirects to marketplace support, not a fabricated refund

queries.text: Order 10234 arrived, but wrong item, and when I called about it before nobody helped, and now the return window might be closed, and I also want to cancel order 10567 which hasn't shipped, oh and update my address for future orders to 32 River Rd Portland OR

gold.expected_outcome: must separately handle: (1) wrong-item on 10234 — eligible regardless of window since it's a fulfillment error, (2) cancel 10567 if unshipped, (3) address update for future orders. Judge checks all three are addressed and not conflated.

queries.text: I was told by chat support I'd get a refund for order 10099 but the email says it's denied, which is right?

gold.expected_outcome: must acknowledge the contradiction, not just pick one source silently, and give a path to resolve (escalate/verify) rather than fabricating a definitive answer

queries.text: Order 10456: partial refund issued but I never received item at all, and support ticket says 'resolved' but nothing happened

gold.expected_outcome: must flag the mismatch between 'partial refund for received-but-flawed item' logic and 'never received' claim — these are different policies (non-delivery vs partial defect), judge checks it doesn't conflate them

queries.text: I have two orders, 10321 and 10788, both damaged, but 10321 is past the window and 10788 isn't, and I paid with mixed store credit + card so refund method is unclear

gold.expected_outcome: must handle both orders with different eligibility outcomes and address the split-payment refund-method question explicitly, not generically

queries.text: My subscription auto-renewed order 10004 but I cancelled it 2 days before renewal via email that may not have been received, need refund and to prevent next month's charge

gold.expected_outcome: must distinguish the past-charge refund question from the future-charge prevention question, and note the uncertainty about whether the cancellation was received rather than assuming either way

queries.text: Order 10999 dispute: item was returned per instructions but tracking shows it was never received by warehouse, meanwhile a partial refund already posted - what's the actual status and what should happen next?

gold.expected_outcome: order 10999 doesn't exist in our system — correct answer surfaces that the order ID itself can't be found, rather than reasoning about tracking/refund status for a nonexistent order
